pi_items.source: Verified via examples/opentoonz_env/scripts/setup_opentoonz.sh which downloads the official OpenToonz samples repository and places dwanko_run.tnz at this exact path.
Verified via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly create and check this directory.
Verified via verifier.py which awards full points only if new_files_count >= 24.
Verified via export_result.sh (extracts bottom_right quadrant) and verifier.py (expects bottom_right_density to be > 0.03 and higher than top_left).
Verified via verifier.py which checks `br_density > (tl_density * 3)` to ensure the content is correctly positioned with the required spatial asymmetry.

privileged_info_summary: The task successfully utilizes the OpenToonz sample animation 'dwanko_run.tnz'. Verifier and task scripts require the output to be rendered as a sequence of at least 24 files inside '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/pip_corner'. Verification involves quadrant-based pixel density checks, confirming that the animation content is predominantly found in the bottom-right quadrant with an expected asymmetry ratio of at least 3.0 compared to the top-left.
